description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pushes to tags, the 'master' branch, and pull requests. Use a matrix strategy to run a job on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-22.04, macos-13, macos-14, windows-2022) with different build types and architectures. For each OS, install dependencies, build the project, and upload artifacts. On macOS, set up signing environment and import signing certificates if required. On tag push, create a release with uploaded assets.
